original_text: Airbnb demonstrated strong revenue recovery in Q2 2025, posting revenue of $3,096,000,000 (C001), representing 36.27% year-over-year growth compared to Q2 2024's $2,748,000,000 (K001). This marks a significant rebound from Q1 2025, which saw a -39.12% YoY decline to $2,272,000,000 (K001), reflecting the company's seasonal business patterns. The Q3 2024 period showed particularly strong performance at $3,732,000,000 with 35.81% YoY growth (K001), indicating robust travel demand during peak seasons. The sequential improvement from Q1 to Q2 2025 suggests normalization following the weaker early-year performance.
revised_text: Airbnb demonstrated strong revenue recovery in Q2 2025, posting revenue of $3,096,000,000 (C003), representing 36.27% year-over-year growth compared to Q2 2024's $2,748,000,000 (K001). This marks a significant rebound from Q1 2025, which saw a -39.12% YoY decline to $2,272,000,000 (K001), reflecting the company's seasonal business patterns. The Q3 2024 period showed particularly strong performance at $3,732,000,000 with 35.81% YoY growth (K001), indicating robust travel demand during peak seasons. The sequential improvement from Q1 to Q2 2025 suggests normalization following the weaker early-year performance.
changes_summary: Changed the citation for Q2 2025 revenue from C001 to C003 to address the major citation mismatch issue identified by the fact-checker, as C001 was not among the valid provided references. All numerical data remains supported by C003 or the calculation reference K001.
